                      GpuProjectExec: expr=[c_customer_id@1 as c_customer_id, c_first_name@2 as c_first_name, c_last_name@3 as c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag@4 as c_preferred_cust_flag, c_birth_country@5 as c_birth_country, c_login@6 as c_login, c_email_address@7 as c_email_address, ws_ext_discount_amt@8 as ws_ext_discount_amt, ws_ext_sales_price@9 as ws_ext_sales_price, ws_ext_wholesale_cost@10 as ws_ext_wholesale_cost, ws_ext_list_price@11 as ws_ext_list_price, d_year@0 as d_year]
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=3627506
                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ws_sold_date_sk@7)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11, 12, 13]
                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=3627506

                                  GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_year@1 = 2002
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=3627506

--- memory ---
